discount.description: Discount in absolute value expressed in the same currency as transaction_amount. If given as integer - must be given in smallest possible unit according to ISO 4217. E.g. 1.99 USD = 199 (cents), 30 BRL = 3000 (centavos), 5 HUF = 500 (filler), 555 JPY = 555 (Yen), 44 BHD = 44000 (fils).

item_id.description: Id of an item the discount is applied to

allOf.description: Additional data associated with this Promotion (limited to 4kB by default)
